summary: The diff implements both REQ-11 and REQ-12 comprehensively. The backend exposes addProduct, updateProduct, and deleteProduct methods. The frontend adds an /admin route with AdminPage, ProductTable, ProductFormDialog, and DeleteProductDialog components. Navigation includes an Admin link. All required form fields, edit pre-fill, delete confirmation, toast notifications, and form validation are present.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle data migration between actor state versions, stripping cart and order data from old state.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for addProduct, updateProduct, and deleteProduct backend methods. No migration infrastructure was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A stats bar on the Admin page showing Total Products, Featured count, and Out of Stock count.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not request any stats or summary metrics on the admin page.
